info.english_meaning: to protect to preserve to eat to consume
info.hindI_arTa: saMrakzaRa karanA pAlana karanA KAnA BakzaRa karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: pAlane parasmEpadI  ' BUjonavane ' iti pAlanaBinnArTe Atmanepaditvam  aByavahAraH = Bojanam  ' Bujed Bunakti BuNkte syuH kOwilye pAlanedane ' (Slo. 65) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'samBojanI sA'BihitA pESAcI dakziRA dvijEH' (manu॰3.141) samBojanI saha Bujyate yayA gozWI bahuBojanAtmikA
'api svitparyaBuNkTAstvaM saMBojyAn vfdDabAlakAn' (BA0 pu0 11443) paryaBuNkTAH parityajyABuNkTAH paryASIrityarTaH bAlavfdDezvanaSitavatsu iti tAtparyam

'parocCizwaM ca yad BuktaM pariBuktaM ca yadBavet' (BA0 anu0 238) pariBuktaM devatAtiTipitfbAlAdIn parivarjya yad BuktaM tatpariBuktamucyate jIrRaM ca pariBuktaM ca yAtayAmamidaM dvayamityamaraH pariBuktaM BuktocCizwam parirvarjane
'nahi te rAjaputraM taM cIrakfzRAjinAmbaram pariBoktuM vyavasyanti pOrA vE DarmavatsalAH' (rA0 612534-35).. pariBoktuM parityajya Boktum rAjaputrAtpUrvamiti tAtparyArTaH
'pariBoktA kfmirBavati kIwo Bavati matsarI' (manu0 2201) pariBoktA'nucitena guruDanenopajIvaka iti kullUkaH kena prasidDArTaM parivarjanapUrvamaSanaM paryahAsInmanvarTamuktAvalIkAra iti na jAnImaH
'na Bokzye na ca pAnIyamupaBokzye kaTaM cana' (BA0 SAM0 2725) upo'rTe nAntaraM karoti yaTA'SnAtyupASnAtI samAnArTO taTA BujyupaBujI api

prayoga.literature_text: tErdattAnapradAyEByo yo BuNkte stena eva saH
na mAMsaM rAGavo BuNakte na cA'pi
BuYjate te tvaGaM pApA ye pacantyAtmakAraRAt
